translation.hero_subtitle: ShareholderVoting.in is a digital platform for shareholders to securely participate in corporate voting, feedback, and governance activities. Experience seamless decision-making with bank-grade security.
translation.login_description: Use your unique credentials sent to your registered email to access the voting portal. Your vote matters!
translation.login_feat1_desc: Your vote is protected from submission to counting
translation.login_feat2_desc: Credentials are automatically invalidated after voting
translation.login_card_desc: Enter your credentials to access voting portal
translation.login_user_id_hint: Your User ID was sent to your registered email
translation.login_encrypted_notice: This is a secure 256-bit encrypted connection
translation.company_login_desc: Access your company dashboard to manage shareholders
translation.company_login_sec_desc: Your login is protected with end-to-end encryption and secure session management.
translation.voting_dash_delegated_to: Your voting rights for this session are delegated to:
translation.voting_dash_appoint_desc: Can't attend? Delegate your voting rights to another trusted shareholder for this session.
translation.voting_dash_complete_desc: All your votes have been cast, encrypted, and recorded on the immutable ledger.
translation.voting_dash_footer_note: All timestamps are recorded in UTC. Voting is governed by company bylaws.
translation.voting_card_receipt_desc: Official record of your vote for corporate audit.
translation.voting_card_hash_tt: This hash anchors your vote to the database immutably.
translation.voting_card_confirm_desc_1: Are you sure you want to vote
translation.voting_card_confirm_warn: This action cannot be undone. Your vote will be cryptographically signed and recorded permanently.
translation.company_reg_subtitle: Set up your company for secure e-voting in just a few minutes
translation.company_reg_step3_desc: Enter the OTP sent to your email
translation.company_reg_secure_desc: Your password is encrypted and stored securely. You'll use this to access your company dashboard.
translation.company_reg_check_email_desc: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
translation.company_reg_bank_sec_desc: Your vote and company data are protected with 256-bit encryption and immutable audit logs.
translation.company_reg_verified_desc: Fully compliant with MCA (Ministry of Corporate Affairs) e-voting regulations.
translation.company_dashboard_subtitle: Manage your shareholders and send voting credentials
translation.company_dashboard_ai_desc: Advanced AI tools to streamline your corporate governance
translation.company_dashboard_sm_desc: Add shareholders and send them secure login credentials via email
translation.company_dashboard_form_secure_desc: Auto-generated unique User ID and password will be sent to the shareholder's email. Credentials are hashed and stored securely.
translation.company_dashboard_list_desc: View and manage all shareholders with their credential status
translation.company_dashboard_results_empty: Select an active session to view results.
translation.company_dashboard_danger_desc: Irreversible actions for your company account
translation.company_dashboard_deregister_desc: Permanently delete your company account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
translation.company_dashboard_dialog_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your company account, all shareholder data, and voting records from our servers.
translation.company_dashboard_dialog_enter_otp_desc: We have sent a 6-digit verification code to your registered email. Please enter it below to confirm deletion.
translation.voting_management_desc: Configure voting sessions, nominate candidates, and manage meeting invites
translation.voting_management_proc_desc: Standard AGM voting process as per corporate governance guidelines
translation.voting_management_proc_1_1: • Create voting session with start/end dates
translation.voting_management_proc_1_4: • Send meeting invites to all stakeholders
translation.voting_management_sched_desc: Configure the voting period and meeting schedule
translation.voting_management_nom_empty_session: Please create a voting session first in the Schedule tab
translation.voting_management_nom_empty: No nominees added yet. Click 'Add Nominee' to get started.
translation.voting_management_meet_desc: Set up the virtual meeting for shareholders and nominees
translation.voting_management_meet_form_link_help: This link will be sent to all shareholders and nominees
translation.voting_management_send_desc: Email meeting details to all shareholders and nominees
translation.voting_management_send_warn: Please add a meeting link before sending invites
translation.voting_management_sec_desc: All voting data is encrypted and securely stored. Meeting invitations are sent with unique identifiers for audit purposes. Votes are final and cannot be modified once submitted, ensuring the integrity of the corporate voting process.
translation.voting_management_res_empty_session: Please create a voting session first.
translation.voting_management_res_locked_desc: Voting results will be available after the session ends on
translation.voting_management_res_audit_desc_unancho: Anchor all votes to the public blockchain for permanent verification.
translation.admin_voting_results_empty: Please select an active voting session to view analysis.
translation.admin_voting_results_desc: Real-time aggregation from the immutable ledger
translation.admin_voting_results_no_votes: No resolutions found for this session.
translation.about_subtitle: We are India's premier digital infrastructure provider for corporate democracy, bridging the gap between companies and their stakeholders through secure, transparent, and technology-driven governance solutions.
translation.about_mission_desc: To modernize corporate governance in India by providing a secure, user-friendly platform that enables companies to conduct meetings and voting in full compliance with the Companies Act, 2013 and SEBI Regulations.
translation.about_who_desc: We are a team of financial technology experts and legal compliance professionals dedicated to building the infrastructure for the next generation of digital corporate democracy in India.
translation.about_values_security_desc: We employ state-of-the-art encryption and security protocols to ensure the integrity of every vote cast.
translation.about_values_transparency_desc: Our platform provides verifiable audit trails, ensuring complete transparency in the voting process.
translation.about_values_compliance_desc: Built with Indian corporate regulations in mind, striving to meet the highest standards of legal adherence.
translation.security_subtitle: ShareholderVoting.in is architected with a security-first mindset, utilizing zero-trust principles and multi-layered defense strategies to protect the sanctity of every vote.
translation.security_enc_desc: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard AES-256 encryption protocols.
translation.security_data_desc: Your data resides securely within Indian borders, complying with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023.
translation.security_audit_desc: Immutable logs track every login, vote, and action, providing a tamper-proof history for compliance audits.
translation.security_infra_desc: Our platform is hosted on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with 99.9% uptime SLAs. We utilize multi-zone redundancy to ensure your voting events are never interrupted.
translation.security_reg_desc: ShareholderVoting.in is designed to adhere to the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and relevant SEBI Regulations. We work continuously with legal experts to ensure our platform adapts to the evolving regulatory landscape in India.
translation.contact_subtitle: Our team of compliance and technical experts is available to assist your organization with digital polling and governance requirements.
translation.contact_office_desc:
Tech Hub, Financial District
Mumbai, Maharashtra 400051, India
translation.feat_subtitle: Our platform combines cutting-edge security technology with intuitive design to deliver a seamless and trustworthy voting experience.
translation.feat_1_desc: All voting data is encrypted from your device to our servers using military-grade 256-bit encryption.
translation.feat_2_desc: Extra layer of security with OTP verification sent to registered mobile numbers and email.
translation.feat_3_desc: Every vote is recorded with tamper-proof logs for complete transparency and regulatory compliance.
translation.feat_4_desc: One-time login credentials for each shareholder, automatically hashed after voting completion.
translation.feat_5_desc: Fully compliant with Securities and Exchange Board of India regulations for e-voting.
translation.feat_6_desc: Vote securely from any device - desktop, tablet, or mobile with responsive design.
translation.feat_7_desc: Automated emails with voting credentials, meeting details, and director nominations.
translation.feat_8_desc: Companies can set custom voting windows with automatic start and end times.
translation.hiw_subtitle: From company registration to final results, our streamlined process ensures a secure and efficient voting experience.
translation.hiw_1_desc: Company registers on the platform, providing corporate details and SEBI-required documentation.
translation.hiw_2_desc: Add director details, their vision for the company, and set voting agenda items.
translation.hiw_3_desc: Shareholders receive unique credentials via email and cast their votes securely.
translation.hiw_4_desc: Voting results are compiled with complete audit trails and regulatory reports.
translation.cta_desc: Join 500+ Indian companies that trust E-Vote India for their shareholder voting needs. Get started in minutes, not days.
translation.cta_trust: No credit card required • Setup in 5 minutes • Cancel anytime
translation.footer_desc: ShareholderVoting.in is a digital platform for corporate governance. We are a private technology provider enabling secure electronic voting.
translation.footer_disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: This is a prototype/demo platform. Not affiliated with NSDL, CDSL, or SEBI. Voting results on this platform are for demonstration of technology capabilities only.
translation.ai_suite_subtitle: Leverage AI to summarize documents and analyze sentiment
translation.ai_val_1_desc: Understand shareholder sentiment instantly without reading thousands of comments manually.
translation.ai_val_2_desc: Summarize lengthy 100+ page reports into concise executive summaries in seconds.
translation.ai_val_3_desc: Make data-driven governance decisions based on real-time aggregated feedback analysis.
translation.ai_feat_desc: Select a tool to get started
translation.ai_feedback_desc: Paste feedback text below to detect sentiment, generate summaries, and extract key themes.
